propositions: A completion-verifier FAIL verdict surfaces unmet criteria piecemeal across rounds, costing extra Gerrit/CI cycles.
The verifier prompt must require exhaustive per-criterion evaluation, emitting one finding per unmet criterion on FAIL, and declare subset-only verdicts incomplete.
A deterministic scorer enumerates_all_unmet_criteria must be implemented and registered to score 1.0 only when the FAIL verdict emits a distinct finding per unmet criterion.
The eval spec must reference the scorer and add a CV-two-unmet-criteria case with exactly two independent acceptance-criteria gaps.
A FakeRunner unit test must assert a two-finding FAIL verdict survives reconcile_verdict and the close path with all findings intact.
reconcile_verdict and close-path logic must remain byte-unchanged with no reconciliation or threshold edits.
